mmcm_0_locked.desc: clk_wiz_0 locked - drives AXI4-Lite and front-end processing logic

mmcm_1_locked.desc: clk_wiz_1 locked - drives Aurora init clock

cmac_2_pll_locked.desc: CMAC PLL locked - from MGT Quad right-hand side of the FPGA driving upper half of QSFP3-DD module

qsfp_dd3_cdr_cfg.desc: QSFP-DD3 lower CDR disabled via i2c (active-high)
